fields.name: OBJNO
fields.description: DEEP2 object number

fields.name: RA
fields.description: Right Ascension (in decimal degrees, J2000)

fields.name: DEC
fields.description: Declination (in decimal degrees, J2000)

fields.name: MAGB
fields.description: CFHT B-band magnitude (AB) from Coil et al. 2004

fields.name: MAGR
fields.description: CFHT R-band magnitude (AB) from Coil et al. 2004

fields.name: MAGI
fields.description: CFHT I-band magnitude (AB) from Coil et al. 2004

fields.name: MAGBERR
fields.description: B-band magnitude error

fields.name: MAGRERR
fields.description: R-band magnitude error

fields.name: MAGIERR
fields.description: I-band magnitude error

fields.name: RG
fields.description: Estimated R-band radius of object (sigma of Gaussian fit in units of pixels - 0.207"/pix)

fields.name: E2
fields.description: Ellipticity defined as E2 = (1 - b/a)

fields.name: PA
fields.description: Object PA (degrees E of N)

fields.name: PGAL
fields.description: The probability (0-1) that the source is a galaxy for unresolved galaxies, 3 if resolved

fields.name: SFD_EBV
fields.description: E(B-V) from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis dust map

fields.name: M_B
fields.description: Absolute B-band magnitude (AB, h = 1) from Willmer et al. (2006)

fields.name: UB
fields.description: Rest-frame U-B color (AB) from Willmer et al. (2006)

fields.name: OBJNAME
fields.description: The 8-digit DEEP2 object id (not always the same as OBJNO)

fields.name: MASK
fields.description: The DEEP2/DEEP3 slitmask number on which the object was observed

fields.name: SLIT
fields.description: The slitlet number (on mask MASKNAME) in which the object was placed

fields.name: DATE
fields.description: Date on which the mask was observed (YYYY-MM-DD)

fields.name: MJD
fields.description: Modified Julian date of observation

fields.name: SLITRA
fields.description: RA of slit center

fields.name: SLITDEC
fields.description: Dec of slit center

fields.name: SLITPA
fields.description: PA (degrees E of N) of slit

fields.name: SLITLEN
fields.description: Length of slit (arcsec)

fields.name: Z
fields.description: Observed best-fitting redshift

fields.name: ZBEST
fields.description: Best redshift (corrected for heliocentric motion)

fields.name: ZERR
fields.description: Redshift error (zerr < 0 indicates problematic z fit)

fields.name: ZQUALITY
fields.description: Redshift quality code, Q (Q >= 3 reliable; Q = -1 stars)

fields.name: CLASS
fields.description: Type of best-fitting template (e.g. GALAXY or STAR)

fields.name: SUBCLASS
fields.description: Coarse classification for stellar templates

fields.name: RCHI2
fields.description: Reduced chi-squared value for the redshift fit

fields.name: DOF
fields.description: Degrees of freedom for redshift fit

fields.name: VDISP
fields.description: Velocity dispersion in km/s

fields.name: VDISPERR
fields.description: Error in velocity dispersion

fields.name: COMMENT
fields.description: Comment field
